plugin.name: SKDReport
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Times Spectre of the Deep (SKD) fights and reports trains/gold/TP/Repop Token/Sigil rewards

trigger.name: skd_start
trigger.match: ^Spectre of the Deep says 'Best to avoid his attention completely if you are able, lest you draw his ire\.'$

trigger.name: skd_parting_gift
trigger.match: ^Spectre of the Deep says, "A parting gift - at least until the brat gets up again\."$

trigger.name: skd_sigil
trigger.match: ^You receive Sigil of the Catacombs from Spectre of the Deep\.$

trigger.name: skd_tp
trigger.match: ^You receive Sea King's Trivia Point Token from Spectre of the Deep\.$

trigger.name: skd_ocean_death
trigger.match: ^You receive \{\{ Ocean Death \}\} from Spectre of the Deep\.$

trigger.name: skd_ocean_life
trigger.match: ^You receive \{\{ Ocean Life \}\} from Spectre of the Deep\.$

muclient.script:
-- =========================================================== -- SKDReport - times Spectre of the Deep encounters and -- reports the combined trains/gold/TP/QP/Repop/Sigil haul. -- All completed runs are saved to a persistent history table -- so lifetime stats survive plugin reloads and MUD restarts. -- ===========================================================
-- Adds thousands separators to a number, e.g. 7234843 -> "7,234,843" local function FormatNumber(n) local formatted = tostring(math.floor(n)) local k while true do formatted, k = formatted:gsub("^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)", '%1,%2') if k == 0 then break end end return formatted end
-- MUSHclient hex colors for ColourNote (xterm indices -> RGB) local MUSH_COLOR = { white = "white", cyan = "#00D7FF", -- xterm 045 yellow = "#875FFF", -- xterm 099 red = "#00FF87", -- xterm 048 }
-- Aardwolf xterm @ codes for channel sends local AARD_COLOR = { white = "@W", cyan = "@x045", yellow = "@x099", red = "@x048", }
-- Takes a list of {colour, text} pairs. -- Returns: -- parts - flat arg list for ColourNote(unpack(parts)) -- plain - plain text string (no colour codes) -- aard - Aardwolf @colour-coded string for channel sends local function BuildLine(segments) local parts = {} local plain = {} local aard = {} for _, seg in ipairs(segments) do table.insert(parts, MUSH_COLOR[seg[1]] or seg[1]) table.insert(parts, "") table.insert(parts, seg[2]) table.insert(plain, seg[2]) table.insert(aard, (AARD_COLOR[seg[1]] or "@W") .. seg[2]) end return parts, table.concat(plain), table.concat(aard) .. "@w" end
-- =========================================================== -- Run history table serialization -- Each entry is a Lua table literal stored as a single string. -- Normal run: {e=elapsed, tr=trains, g=gold, tp=tp, qp=qp, -- rp=repop, si=sigil, ts=timestamp} -- Legacy batch (migrated from old life_* vars): -- {legacy=1, lruns=N, e=..., tr=..., ...} -- ===========================================================
local function SerializeRuns(runs) local parts = {} for _, r in ipairs(runs) do if r.legacy then parts[#parts+1] = string.format( "{legacy=1,lruns=%d,e=%d,tr=%d,g=%d,tp=%d,qp=%d,rp=%d,si=%d}", r.lruns or 1, r.e or 0, r.tr or 0, r.g or 0, r.tp or 0, r.qp or 0, r.rp or 0, r.si or 0) else parts[#parts+1] = string.format( "{e=%d,tr=%d,g=%d,tp=%d,qp=%d,rp=%d,si=%d,ts=%d}", r.e or 0, r.tr or 0, r.g or 0, r.tp or 0, r.qp or 0, r.rp or 0, r.si or 0, r.ts or 0) end end return "{" .. table.concat(parts, ",") .. "}" end
local function DeserializeRuns() local s = GetVariable("run_history") or "" if s == "" then return {} end local chunk = loadstring("return " .. s) if not chunk then return {} end local ok, result = pcall(chunk) if not ok or type(result) ~= "table" then return {} end return result end
-- Append one run record to the persistent history local function AppendRun(rec) local runs = DeserializeRuns() runs[#runs+1] = rec SetVariable("run_history", SerializeRuns(runs)) end
-- Sum all run records into a single totals table local function ComputeLifeTotals() local runs = DeserializeRuns() local t = { runs=0, elapsed=0, trains=0, gold=0, tp=0, qp=0, repop=0, sigil=0 } for _, r in ipairs(runs) do local n = (r.legacy == 1 and r.lruns) and r.lruns or 1 t.runs = t.runs + n t.elapsed = t.elapsed + (r.e or 0) t.trains = t.trains + (r.tr or 0) t.gold = t.gold + (r.g or 0) t.tp = t.tp + (r.tp or 0) t.qp = t.qp + (r.qp or 0) t.repop = t.repop + (r.rp or 0) t.sigil = t.sigil + (r.si or 0) end return t end
-- =========================================================== -- GMCP area tracking -- ===========================================================
local GMCP_HANDLER_ID = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264"
local function GetCurrentArea() local ok, ret, datastring = pcall(CallPlugin, GMCP_HANDLER_ID, "gmcpdata_as_string", "room.info") if not ok or ret ~= 0 or not datastring or datastring == "" then return nil end local chunk = loadstring("return " .. datastring) if not chunk then return nil end local ok2, room_info = pcall(chunk) if not ok2 or type(room_info) ~= "table" then return nil end return room_info.area or room_info.Area end
-- =========================================================== -- Run state -- ===========================================================
local function ResetSKD() skd_timing = false skd_recording = false skd_start_time = nil skd_end_time = nil skd_trains = 0 skd_gold = 0 skd_tp = 0 skd_qp = 0 skd_repop = 0 skd_sigil = 0 skd_run_area = nil end
-- Migrate old flat life_* variables into the run_history table. -- Called once from OnPluginInstall when run_history doesn't exist yet. local function MigrateOldStats() local old_runs = tonumber(GetVariable("life_runs")) or 0 if old_runs == 0 then SetVariable("run_history", "{}") return end -- Wrap all old aggregate data in a single legacy batch entry local legacy = { legacy = 1, lruns = old_runs, e = tonumber(GetVariable("life_elapsed")) or 0, tr = tonumber(GetVariable("life_trains")) or 0, g = tonumber(GetVariable("life_gold")) or 0, tp = tonumber(GetVariable("life_tp")) or 0, qp = tonumber(GetVariable("life_qp")) or 0, rp = tonumber(GetVariable("life_repop")) or 0, si = tonumber(GetVariable("life_sigil")) or 0, } SetVariable("run_history", SerializeRuns({legacy})) ColourNote("#00D7FF", "", string.format( "SKDReport: migrated %d run(s) of existing stats into run history table.", old_runs)) end
function OnPluginInstall() if GetVariable("channel") == nil then SetVariable("channel", "") end -- First-time setup or migration from old life_* variables if GetVariable("run_history") == nil then MigrateOldStats() end ResetSKD() ShowSKDHelp() end
function OnPluginConnect() ResetSKD() end
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if id ~= GMCP_HANDLER_ID then return end if text ~= "room.info" then return end if not (skd_timing or skd_recording) then return end if not skd_run_area then return end local current_area = GetCurrentArea() if current_area and current_area ~= skd_run_area then ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: left '" .. skd_run_area .. "' (now in '" .. current_area .. "') - run aborted.") ResetSKD() end end
-- =========================================================== -- Trigger handlers -- ===========================================================
function StartSKDTimer(name, line, wildcards) ResetSKD() skd_timing = true skd_start_time = os.time() skd_run_area = GetCurrentArea() end
function EndSKDTimerStartRecording(name, line, wildcards) if skd_timing then skd_end_time = os.time() skd_timing = false end skd_recording = true end
function CaptureTrainsGold(name, line, wildcards) if not skd_recording then return end skd_trains = skd_trains + (tonumber((wildcards[1]:gsub(",", ""))) or 0) skd_gold = skd_gold + (tonumber((wildcards[2]:gsub(",", ""))) or 0) end
function CaptureSigil(name, line, wildcards) if not skd_recording then return end skd_sigil = skd_sigil + 1 end
function CaptureTP(name, line, wildcards) if not skd_recording then return end skd_tp = skd_tp + 1 end
function CaptureRepop(name, line, wildcards) if not skd_recording then return end skd_repop = skd_repop + 1 end
function CaptureQP(name, line, wildcards) if not skd_recording then return end skd_qp = skd_qp + (tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 0) end
-- =========================================================== -- FinishSKD - report and save the completed run -- ===========================================================
function FinishSKD(name, line, wildcards) if not skd_recording then return end skd_recording = false
local TRAINS_PER_PUP = 4 local time_str = "N/A" local pups_str = nil local rate_str = nil local elapsed = nil
if skd_start_time and skd_end_time then elapsed = skd_end_time - skd_start_time if elapsed < 0 then elapsed = 0 end time_str = string.format("%d:%02d", math.floor(elapsed/60), elapsed%60) end
if elapsed and skd_trains > 0 then local pups = skd_trains / TRAINS_PER_PUP pups_str = string.format("%.2f", pups) rate_str = string.format("%.2fs", elapsed / pups) end
local channel = GetVariable("channel")
local segs = { {"cyan", "SKD"}, {"white", ": ["}, {"yellow","Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", time_str}, {"white", "]"}, }
if pups_str then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", pups_str} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " "} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "pups"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " @ "} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", rate_str} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", FormatNumber(skd_trains)} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " "} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "Trains"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "] ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", FormatNumber(skd_gold)} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " "} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "Gold"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"}
if skd_tp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", tostring(skd_tp)} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "TP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
if skd_qp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", tostring(skd_qp)} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " "} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "QP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
if skd_repop > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "Repop Token"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
if skd_sigil > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "Sigil"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
local parts, plain, aard = BuildLine(segs) ColourNote(unpack(parts)) if channel and channel ~= "" then Send(channel .. " " .. aard) end
skd_last_run_aard = aard
-- Save this run to the persistent history table if elapsed then AppendRun({ e = elapsed, tr = skd_trains, g = skd_gold, tp = skd_tp, qp = skd_qp, rp = skd_repop, si = skd_sigil, ts = os.time(), }) end
ResetSKD() end
-- =========================================================== -- Alias handlers -- ===========================================================
function SetSKDChannel(name, line, wildcards) local arg = wildcards[1] if not arg or arg == "" then local current = GetVariable("channel") if current == "" then ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: no channel set - reports display locally only.") else ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: channel is currently set to '" .. current .. "'.") end return end if arg == "none" or arg == "off" or arg == "clear" then SetVariable("channel", "") ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: channel cleared - reports will display locally only.") else SetVariable("channel", arg) ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: channel set to '" .. arg .. "'.") end end
function ResetSKDCommand(name, line, wildcards) ResetSKD() ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: state reset.") end
function SendLastRun(name, line, wildcards) local dest = (wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1] or GetVariable("channel") if not dest or dest == "" then ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: no channel set - use 'skdreport channel <name>' first.") return end if not skd_last_run_aard or skd_last_run_aard == "" then ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: no completed run to report yet.") return end Send(dest .. " " .. skd_last_run_aard) end
-- =========================================================== -- Lifetime stats display -- ===========================================================
local function BuildSummaryLine(label, t) local life_time_str if t.elapsed >= 3600 then life_time_str = string.format("%d:%02d:%02d", math.floor(t.elapsed/3600), math.floor((t.elapsed%3600)/60), t.elapsed%60) else life_time_str = string.format("%d:%02d", math.floor(t.elapsed/60), t.elapsed%60) end
local life_pups_str = "N/A" local life_rate_str = "N/A" if t.trains > 0 and t.elapsed > 0 then local pups = t.trains / 4 life_pups_str = string.format("%.2f", pups) life_rate_str = string.format("%.2fs", t.elapsed / pups) end
local avg_str = "N/A" if t.runs > 0 then local avg = math.floor(t.elapsed / t.runs) avg_str = string.format("%d:%02d", math.floor(avg/60), avg%60) end
local segs = { {"cyan", label}, {"white", ": ["}, {"yellow", "Runs"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(t.runs)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", life_time_str}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Avg"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", avg_str}, {"white", "] ["}, {"red", life_pups_str}, {"white", " "}, {"yellow", "pups"}, {"white", " @ "}, {"red", life_rate_str}, {"white", "] ["}, {"red", FormatNumber(t.trains)}, {"white", " "}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", "] ["}, {"red", FormatNumber(t.gold)}, {"white", " "}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", "]"}, }
if t.tp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", tostring(t.tp)} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow","TP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end if t.qp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", tostring(t.qp)} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " "} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "QP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end if t.repop > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "Repop Tokens"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", ": "} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", tostring(t.repop)} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end if t.sigil > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "Sigils"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", ": "} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", tostring(t.sigil)} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
local parts, plain, aard = BuildLine(segs) return parts, aard end
local function BuildLifeLine() return BuildSummaryLine("SKD Life", ComputeLifeTotals()) end
-- Most recent 7am (today's 7am, or yesterday's if it's currently before 7am). local function GetDayCutoff() local now = os.time() local t = os.date("*t", now) t.hour, t.min, t.sec = 7, 0, 0 local cutoff = os.time(t) if now < cutoff then cutoff = cutoff - 86400 end return cutoff end
-- Sum only runs completed since the most recent 7am. Legacy batch entries -- (no real timestamp) are never counted toward the daily total. local function ComputeDayTotals() local runs = DeserializeRuns() local cutoff = GetDayCutoff() local t = { runs=0, elapsed=0, trains=0, gold=0, tp=0, qp=0, repop=0, sigil=0 } for _, r in ipairs(runs) do if not r.legacy and r.ts and r.ts >= cutoff then t.runs = t.runs + 1 t.elapsed = t.elapsed + (r.e or 0) t.trains = t.trains + (r.tr or 0) t.gold = t.gold + (r.g or 0) t.tp = t.tp + (r.tp or 0) t.qp = t.qp + (r.qp or 0) t.repop = t.repop + (r.rp or 0) t.sigil = t.sigil + (r.si or 0) end end return t end
local function BuildDayLine() return BuildSummaryLine("SKD Day", ComputeDayTotals()) end
function ShowSKDLife(name, line, wildcards) local parts, aard = BuildLifeLine() ColourNote(unpack(parts)) end
function SendLifeReport(name, line, wildcards) local dest = (wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1] or GetVariable("channel") if not dest or dest == "" then ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: no channel set - use 'skdreport channel <name>' first.") return end local parts, aard = BuildLifeLine() Send(dest .. " " .. aard) end
function SendDayReport(name, line, wildcards) local t = ComputeDayTotals() local dest = (wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1] or GetVariable("channel") if t.runs == 0 then ColourNote("white", "", "SKDReport: no SKD runs since 7am yet.") return end local parts, aard = BuildDayLine() if dest and dest ~= "" then Send(dest .. " " .. aard) else ColourNote(unpack(parts)) end end
function ResetSKDLife(name, line, wildcards) SetVariable("run_history", "{}") ColourNote("#00D7FF", "", "SKDReport: lifetime stats have been reset.") end
-- =========================================================== -- Help -- ===========================================================
function ShowSKDHelp(name, line, wildcards) local function P(segs) local parts = BuildLine(segs) ColourNote(unpack(parts)) end
P({ {"white","["}, {"cyan","SKDReport"}, {"white","] Help"} })
P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreport channel"},{"white"," "},{"yellow","<name>"}, {"white"," - set report channel (e.g. "},{"yellow","gt"},{"white","); blank shows current, "}, {"yellow","none"},{"white"," clears it"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreport reset"}, {"white"," - manually clear/abort an in-progress run"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreport life"}, {"white"," - show lifetime totals locally"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreport resetlife"}, {"white"," - wipe all lifetime run history"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreport"},{"white"," "},{"yellow","[channel]"}, {"white"," - resend last run to "},{"yellow","<channel>"},{"white"," or set channel if omitted"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreportlife"},{"white"," "},{"yellow","[channel]"}, {"white"," - send lifetime stats to "},{"yellow","<channel>"},{"white"," or set channel if omitted"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreportday"},{"white"," "},{"yellow","[channel]"}, {"white"," - report runs since 7am to "},{"yellow","<channel>"},{"white"," (default channel, or locally if none)"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"cyan","skdreport help"}, {"white"," - show this help"}, }) P({ {"white"," "},{"yellow","Automatic:"}, {"white"," timer starts/stops off SKD's spoken lines; run aborted via GMCP if you leave the area."}, }) end
